sys_script_client.description:
// 2.8.1 | 2023-05-01 - raj - DFCT0011799 - TBD - System Setting: Turn off Organizational Privacy > // 2.8 | 2022-08-14 | raj | STRY0127037 - (MVP) Org Hierarchy- Schedule Override messaging "You don't have permissions" 2.8 | 2022-02-13 - raj - STRY0117523 - Org Hierarchy- Office Schedule Override- Add System Settings to turn on/off feature 2.8 | 2022-02-11 - raj - STRY0080678 - Org Hierarchy- External or Internal OU- Label update Removed the info message: "Check this field to create an External Organizational Unit. Uncheck this field to create an Internal Organizational Unit."
2.7 STRY0059849 - OU Roles - OU Hierarchy Administrator
sys_script_client.messages: No OU Hierarchy Administrators in this OU. The OU Hierarchy Administrator(s) ({0}) from OU ({1}) are responsible for maintaining this OU. Tasker - Tasks and Templates in this Office will set the suspense date to follow the selected schedule. Otherwise, it will follow system settings. Tasker - This feature requires ServiceNow Administrative permissions. If disabled, please contact your Administrator.
sys_script_client.name: OU Heirarchy- onLoad - Show InfoMessages
